statement: In every magma, Equation 1268 (`x = x * (((y * z) * z) * z)`) implies Equation 1426 (`x = (x * x) * (x * (x * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0187
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op x (op (op (op y z) z) z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op x x) (op x (op x x)))
